warnings: name: fukui_charge_conservation_f+ ok: true severity: warning detail: sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
name: fukui_charge_conservation_f- ok: true severity: warning detail: sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
name: schema_header ok: true severity: warning detail: common header present

prose: The Fukui reactivity analysis for benzaldehyde using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set in the gas phase has been completed. The results include the most electrophilic and nucleophilic sites, as well as the dual descriptor. Warnings indicate that charge conservation might have some drift, suggesting a possible N±1 state convergence issue, but overall the analysis has been performed successfully.
